user_request: Prepare a detailed plaint for recovery of Rs.15,00,000/- advanced as a hand loan by bank transfer. There is no written agreement. The transaction is supported by bank statement and WhatsApp communications. The Defendant has failed to repay despite repeated oral demands and legal notice. Plead limitation properly. Claim interest at 12% per annum from date of loan till realization. Draft strictly in accordance with Order VII CPC. Include proper cause of action, jurisdiction, valuation, court fee and prayer clause. Use formal Indian court language suitable for filing before City Civil Court, Bengaluru.

facts.summary: Recovery of Rs. 15,00,000 advanced as a hand loan via bank transfer without a written agreement. The transaction is supported by bank statements and WhatsApp communications. The defendant failed to repay despite repeated oral demands and a legal notice.

chronology.event: Loan of Rs. 15,00,000 advanced via bank transfer
Repeated oral demands made for repayment
Defendant failed to repay the amount

evidence.description: Record of the bank transfer of Rs. 15,00,000 to the defendant
Communications between parties supporting the loan transaction
Legal notice sent to the defendant demanding repayment
evidence.relevance: Proof of demand prior to suit

missing_fields: Plaintiff and Defendant names and addresses
assumptions: Suit is filed within the statutory limitation period
Cause of action arose within Bengaluru jurisdiction

enforceable and court-fees for divorce petition is not Rs. 20/- but Re. 1/- as prescribed for petition.33

relinquished; and

draft_artifacts.title: Plaint for Recovery of Hand Loan - Order VII CPC Compliant
draft_artifacts.text:
IN THE CITY CIVIL COURT AT BENGALURU

C.S. No. ________ of {{SUIT_YEAR}}

BETWEEN:

{{PLAINTIFF_NAME}},
{{PLAINTIFF_AGE}}, {{PLAINTIFF_OCCUPATION}},
residing at {{PLAINTIFF_ADDRESS}}
                                            … PLAINTIFF

AND:

{{DEFENDANT_NAME}},
{{DEFENDANT_AGE}}, {{DEFENDANT_OCCUPATION}},
residing at {{DEFENDANT_ADDRESS}}
                                            … DEFENDANT

SUIT FOR RECOVERY OF RS. 15,00,000/- (RUPEES FIFTEEN LAKHS ONLY) WITH INTEREST THEREON @ 12% PER ANNUM FROM THE DATE OF LOAN TILL REALIZATION

RESPECTFULLY SUBMITTED:

1. The Plaintiff is {{PLAINTIFF_AGE}} years of age and {{PLAINTIFF_OCCUPATION}} by profession, residing at {{PLAINTIFF_ADDRESS}}. The Defendant is {{DEFENDANT_AGE}} years of age and {{DEFENDANT_OCCUPATION}} by profession, residing at {{DEFENDANT_ADDRESS}}.

2. The Plaintiff and Defendant are known to each other. Sometime prior to {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, the Defendant approached the Plaintiff and requested a hand loan of Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only) for personal/business exigencies.

3. On {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, the Plaintiff advanced a sum of Rs. 15,00,000/- to the Defendant as a hand loan through electronic bank transfer from the Plaintiff's account to the Defendant's account. A true copy of the bank statement evidencing the said transfer is annexed hereto and marked as **Annexure-A**.

4. The said transaction was purely an oral agreement for loan without any written instrument, promissory note, or security. There exists no written agreement documenting the said loan transaction.

5. The existence of the loan and the liability of the Defendant to repay the same is corroborated by the WhatsApp communications exchanged between the parties, whereby the Defendant acknowledged the receipt of the said amount and promised to repay the same. True copies of the said WhatsApp communications are annexed hereto and marked as **Annexure-B**.

6. It was orally agreed between the parties that the Defendant would repay the said amount within a reasonable time and that the Defendant would pay interest thereon at the rate of 12% per annum from the date of the loan until realization.

7. Thereafter, the Plaintiff made repeated oral demands upon the Defendant to repay the principal amount along with the agreed interest. Despite such demands, the Defendant failed and neglected to repay the amount.

8. Subsequently, on {{DATE_OF_LEGAL_NOTICE}}, the Plaintiff caused a legal notice to be issued to the Defendant demanding repayment of the said loan amount with interest within the stipulated time. A true copy of the said legal notice along with the proof of dispatch is annexed hereto and marked as **Annexure-C**.

9. The Defendant received the said legal notice but failed to comply with the demand or tender any repayment. The Defendant has thus failed to discharge his lawful debt owed to the Plaintiff.

10. The Defendant is liable to pay the principal sum of Rs. 15,00,000/- together with interest thereon at the rate of 12% per annum from the date of the loan, i.e., {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, till the date of realization of the decree.

CAUSE OF ACTION:

11. The cause of action for the present suit first arose on {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, when the Plaintiff advanced the loan amount to the Defendant, and subsequently on the dates when the Plaintiff made oral demands for repayment and particularly on {{DATE_OF_CAUSE_OF_ACTION}}, when the Defendant refused and failed to repay the amount despite the legal notice dated {{DATE_OF_LEGAL_NOTICE}}, thus causing the right to sue to accrue to the Plaintiff under law. The cause of action is continuing in nature.

JURISDICTION:

12. This Hon'ble Court has territorial jurisdiction to entertain the present suit as the Defendant resides at {{DEFENDANT_ADDRESS}} within the territorial jurisdiction of this Hon'ble Court at Bengaluru and/or part of the cause of action arose within the jurisdiction of this Hon'ble Court.

13. This Hon'ble Court has pecuniary jurisdiction to entertain the present suit as the subject-matter of the suit is valued at Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only) for the purpose of jurisdiction, which is well within the pecuniary limits of the City Civil Court, Bengaluru.

VALUATION AND COURT FEE:

14. The valuation of the suit for the purposes of jurisdiction and court fees is Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only), being the principal amount claimed. The requisite court fee of Rs. {{COURT_FEE_AMOUNT}} has been paid on the plaint as per the Karnataka Court Fees and Suits Valuation Act, 1958 and the rules made thereunder.

LIMITATION:

15. The present suit has been filed within the prescribed period of limitation. The suit is filed under Article {{LIMITATION_ARTICLE}} of the First Schedule to the Limitation Act, 1963, within three years from {{DATE_OF_CAUSE_OF_ACTION}}, when the right to sue first accrued to the Plaintiff upon the Defendant's failure to repay the demanded amount. The Plaintiff submits that the suit is not barred by limitation.

PRAYER:

In view of the foregoing facts and circumstances, it is most humbly prayed that this Hon'ble Court may be pleased to:

(a) Pass a decree in favour of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant for a sum of Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only);

(b) Award interest on the decreed amount at the rate of 12% per annum from the date of the loan till the date of realization of the decree;

(c) Award costs of the present suit to the Plaintiff;

(d) Grant such other relief(s) as this Hon'ble Court may deem fit and proper in the facts and circumstances of the case.

draft_artifacts.text:
IN THE CITY CIVIL COURT AT BENGALURU

C.S. No. ________ of {{SUIT_YEAR}}

BETWEEN:

{{PLAINTIFF_NAME}},
{{PLAINTIFF_AGE}}, {{PLAINTIFF_OCCUPATION}},
residing at {{PLAINTIFF_ADDRESS}}
                                            … PLAINTIFF

AND:

{{DEFENDANT_NAME}},
{{DEFENDANT_AGE}}, {{DEFENDANT_OCCUPATION}},
residing at {{DEFENDANT_ADDRESS}}
                                            … DEFENDANT

SUIT FOR RECOVERY OF RS. 15,00,000/- (RUPEES FIFTEEN LAKHS ONLY) WITH INTEREST THEREON @ 12% PER ANNUM FROM THE DATE OF LOAN TILL REALIZATION

RESPECTFULLY SUBMITTED:

1. The Plaintiff is {{PLAINTIFF_AGE}} years of age and {{PLAINTIFF_OCCUPATION}} by profession, residing at {{PLAINTIFF_ADDRESS}}. The Defendant is {{DEFENDANT_AGE}} years of age and {{DEFENDANT_OCCUPATION}} by profession, residing at {{DEFENDANT_ADDRESS}}.

2. The Plaintiff and Defendant are known to each other. Sometime prior to {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, the Defendant approached the Plaintiff and requested a hand loan of Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only) for personal/business exigencies.

3. On {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, the Plaintiff advanced a sum of Rs. 15,00,000/- to the Defendant as a hand loan through electronic bank transfer from the Plaintiff's account to the Defendant's account. A true copy of the bank statement evidencing the said transfer is annexed hereto and marked as **Annexure-A**.

4. The said transaction was purely an oral agreement for loan without any written instrument, promissory note, or security. There exists no written agreement documenting the said loan transaction.

5. The existence of the loan and the liability of the Defendant to repay the same is corroborated by the WhatsApp communications exchanged between the parties, whereby the Defendant acknowledged the receipt of the said amount and promised to repay the same. True copies of the said WhatsApp communications are annexed hereto and marked as **Annexure-B**.

6. It was orally agreed between the parties that the Defendant would repay the said amount within a reasonable time and that the Defendant would pay interest thereon at the rate of 12% per annum from the date of the loan until realization.

7. Thereafter, the Plaintiff made repeated oral demands upon the Defendant to repay the principal amount along with the agreed interest. Despite such demands, the Defendant failed and neglected to repay the amount.

8. Subsequently, on {{DATE_OF_LEGAL_NOTICE}}, the Plaintiff caused a legal notice to be issued to the Defendant demanding repayment of the said loan amount with interest within the stipulated time. A true copy of the said legal notice along with the proof of dispatch is annexed hereto and marked as **Annexure-C**.

9. The Defendant received the said legal notice but failed to comply with the demand or tender any repayment. The Defendant has thus failed to discharge his lawful debt owed to the Plaintiff.

10. The Defendant is liable to pay the principal sum of Rs. 15,00,000/- together with interest thereon at the rate of 12% per annum from the date of the loan, i.e., {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, till the date of realization of the decree.

CAUSE OF ACTION:

11. The cause of action for the present suit first arose on {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, when the Plaintiff advanced the loan amount to the Defendant, and subsequently on the dates when the Plaintiff made oral demands for repayment and particularly on {{DATE_OF_CAUSE_OF_ACTION}}, when the Defendant refused and failed to repay the amount despite the legal notice dated {{DATE_OF_LEGAL_NOTICE}}, thus causing the right to sue to accrue to the Plaintiff under law. The cause of action is continuing in nature.

JURISDICTION:

12. This Hon'ble Court has territorial jurisdiction to entertain the present suit as the Defendant resides at {{DEFENDANT_ADDRESS}} within the territorial jurisdiction of this Hon'ble Court at Bengaluru and/or part of the cause of action arose within the jurisdiction of this Hon'ble Court.

13. This Hon'ble Court has pecuniary jurisdiction to entertain the present suit as the subject-matter of the suit is valued at Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only) for the purpose of jurisdiction, which is well within the pecuniary limits of the City Civil Court, Bengaluru.

VALUATION AND COURT FEE:

14. The valuation of the suit for the purposes of jurisdiction and court fees is Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only), being the principal amount claimed. The requisite court fee of Rs. {{COURT_FEE_AMOUNT}} has been paid on the plaint as per the Karnataka Court Fees and Suits Valuation Act, 1958 and the rules made thereunder.

LIMITATION:

15. The present suit has been filed within the prescribed period of limitation. The suit is filed under Article {{LIMITATION_ARTICLE}} of the First Schedule to the Limitation Act, 1963, within three years from {{DATE_OF_CAUSE_OF_ACTION}}, when the right to sue first accrued to the Plaintiff upon the Defendant's failure to repay the demanded amount. The Plaintiff submits that the suit is not barred by limitation.

PRAYER:

In view of the foregoing facts and circumstances, it is most humbly prayed that this Hon'ble Court may be pleased to:

(a) Pass a decree in favour of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant for a sum of Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only);

(b) Award interest on the decreed amount at the rate of 12% per annum from the date of the loan till the date of realization of the decree;

(c) Award costs of the present suit to the Plaintiff;

(d) Grant such other relief(s) as this Hon'ble Court may deem fit and proper in the facts and circumstances of the case.

VERIFICATION:

I, {{PLAINTIFF_NAME}}, the Plaintiff above-named, do hereby verify and state on solemn affirmation that the contents of paras 1 to 15 of the foregoing plaint are true and correct to the best of my knowledge, belief and information, and no part thereof is false and nothing material has been concealed therefrom.

Verified at Bengaluru on this {{VERIFICATION_DATE}} day of {{VERIFICATION_MONTH}}, {{VERIFICATION_YEAR}}.

_____________________
{{PLAINTIFF_NAME}}
PLAINTIFF

LIST OF DOCUMENTS/ANNEXURES:

1. **Annexure-A**: Copy of the Bank Statement evidencing transfer of Rs. 15,00,000/- from Plaintiff's account to Defendant's account.

2. **Annexure-B**: Copies of WhatsApp Communications between the Plaintiff and Defendant acknowledging the loan and liability.

3. **Annexure-C**: Copy of the Legal Notice dated {{DATE_OF_LEGAL_NOTICE}} along with proof of dispatch/service.
